title: Store and Franchise Management on monday.com with Master Data
excerpt:
Does your business have multiple stores and franchise? Do you manage your operations on monday.com? Are you scaling up quickly? If yes, we got the perfect monday.com application for you!

posts.author: timmykho (Tim Kho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does your business have multiple stores and franchise? Do you manage your operations on monday.com? Are you scaling up quickly? If yes, we got the perfect monday.com application for you!

We designed Master Data with the vision of having everything in one place – your Master Board. Multiple boards? No limits. Large amount of data? All in one high-level board in monday.com. Data centralization? Simplified.

Master Data centralizes all of the data from of each of your individual stores into one Master Board. This is what others call a high-level board or centralized board because every data flows in to here. Through its cross-board sync functionality, Master Data syncs every item and any column value change from the source boards, which in this case, are your individual store boards. This is made possible with only two automations – one installed in your source board and one installed in the Master Board. After these automations are installed, and the configurations set up properly, start watching as your data automatically flows from every store to the high-level board in monday.com!

Read more on how Master Data helps with store and franchise management here.

Need help with setting up a Master Board or have any monday.com related questions? Book us for a free 30 minute consultation here.
